author: doll-agent
content: Add tests/nested_dual.rs covering second-order derivatives via DualNumber<DualNumber<f64>>. Helper second_deriv(f, a) takes a closed-form fn and returns (f(a), f'(a), f''(a)) by setting up the standard nested seeds. 11 tests covering x^2, x^3, x^4, sin/cos, exp, ln, sqrt, sin(x^2) chain rule, constant, identity.
